# Synesis IT | | | | :-| :- | | Founding year | | | Company Website | https://synesisit.com.bd/ | | Career Website | https://synesisit.com.bd/career/ | | Technologies Used| | ## Introduction Synesis takes a on campus written test first. The questions contain some coding problem, Database, writting sql, OOP etc The second stage is face to face interview ## Questions ### Interview Question How would you manage your team if some teammate doesn't cooperate or doesn't contribute?
Show Answer Answer varies from person to person
